# Copilot instructions — AiRT2

The canonical agent instructions for this repo live in
[`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) at the repo root. That file is auto-loaded
by pi, Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and other AGENTS.md-aware coding
agents. Read it before doing anything else in this repo.

This stub exists so that GitHub Copilot's older
`.github/copilot-instructions.md` discovery path still finds the same
guidance. **Do not edit this file** — edit `AGENTS.md` instead. Keeping
two copies in sync is a drift trap.

See [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md).
